race.comment: HEY BELLA (12) has placed at both runs this time in, the latest finishing third over 1514m at Yarra Valley. Well placed here and draws well. Overdue and gets her chance to break through. BEARBRASSBLACKFISH (1) was below his best last time, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths over 1600m at Moe. Looks well placed so expect a big run this time. MORAL TURPITUDE (4) raced in town last time and missed the frame, finishing sixth over 1600m at Caulfield Heath. Previous form sound so watch for a much better run in this line-up. MARIOTA (10) was well off bets last time but freshened since and will be running on hard.
